stemHtml: Which of the following statements regarding RNAV 1 and RNP 1 is correct?

options.a: RNP 1 and RNAV 1 both require monitoring and alerting function.
options.b: Just RNP 1 requires monitoring and alerting function.
options.c: Just RNAV 1 requires monitoring and alerting function.
options.d: RNP 1 and RNAV 1 both require monitoring, but only RNP 1 requires alerting function.
